no_changes_rationale:
status: needs_investigation
reason: The bead targets dead aggregators in `cli/internal/agent/agent_usage.go`, but that file does not exist in this branch. The current usage helpers live in `cli/internal/agent/session_usage.go:29-157`, and they are still called from production GraphQL code in `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_providers.go:143-148`, `233-268`, `415-487`. The local tests in `cli/internal/agent/usage_test.go:102-206` still exercise the live aggregation surface. Removing these symbols would break the current implementation rather than clean dead code. The stale audit note referenced `cli/cmd/agent_usage.go`, which is absent here. A follow-up investigation bead needs to re-audit the current branch and identify the actual dead surface before deletion is attempted.
